zotero.abstractNote: We propose POETREE, a framework for learning interpretable policies in reinforcement learning. POETREE learns a decision tree policy by iteratively growing the tree using a novel adaptive splitting criterion. The criterion is based on the expected improvement in the value function, which allows the tree to grow in a way that balances interpretability and performance. We demonstrate the effectiveness of POETREE on a variety of reinforcement learning tasks, showing that it can achieve performance comparable to black-box policies while being significantly more interpretable.
